# Tiago Leao Real Estate — Guanacaste, Costa Rica

> Tiago Leao is a luxury real estate agent at KRAIN Luxury Real Estate serving Guanacaste, Costa Rica ("this coast"): Tamarindo, Playa Flamingo, Playa Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, and Samara. He specializes in helping American and Canadian buyers purchase homes, condos, villas, and land in Costa Rica, and in helping owners sell. He lives and works in Guanacaste full time, offers guidance in English, Spanish, and Portuguese, and uses AI-driven marketing plus professional photo/video to sell listings. Contact: tiago@soldbytiago.com · WhatsApp +506 8302 8660 · Instagram @soldbytiago.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Full name: Tiago Leao (brand: "Sold by Tiago")
- Role: Real estate agent/advisor, KRAIN Luxury Real Estate, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Serves: American and Canadian buyers and sellers of Costa Rica real estate
- Market focus: Guanacaste's beach towns — Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, Samara
- Typical price range: $200,000 to $5,000,000+
- Website: https://soldbytiago.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://soldbytiago.com/): About Tiago, how he works, FAQ about buying in Costa Rica, contact form
- [About Tiago Leao](https://soldbytiago.com/about.html): Full bio (grew up on Costa Rica's North Pacific coast, started at 18 behind the camera, UF business degree, trilingual EN/ES/PT), how he works, and client reviews
- [Properties for sale](https://soldbytiago.com/properties.html): Current Guanacaste listings with map search
- [Communities guide](https://soldbytiago.com/communities.html): Local guide to every beach town on this coast — Playas del Coco, Potrero, Flamingo, Conchal/Brasilito, Playa Grande, Tamarindo, Langosta, Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla, Marbella, Nosara — vibe, who each fits, market notes, and current listings per town
- [Blog](https://soldbytiago.com/blog.html): Guides on buying, taxes, towns, investment, and residency in Costa Rica
- [Expat Buyer's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/buyers-guide.html): Q&A reference for North American buyers — escrow, SUGEF and wiring money, closing costs (3.5-4.5%), property tax (0.25%), Luxury Home Tax, fee simple vs. concession land, corporations, financing, due diligence, capital gains (15%), and the $150k residency link
- [Seller's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/sellers-guide.html): Selling property in Costa Rica — commissions (5-6% + 13% VAT), capital gains (15% of gain or 2.25% gross pre-2019 option), the 2.5% non-resident withholding, corporation sales, documents, timelines, and a net-proceeds calculator

## Schools (for families relocating to Guanacaste)

- [Schools here in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/schools.html): Every international, bilingual and private school in the Guanacaste beach towns, with grades, curriculum, languages and accreditation for each. No ratings — Costa Rica has no GreatSchools equivalent, so only what each school publishes is listed.
- [Costa Rica International Academy (CRIA)](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=costa-rica-international-academy): Brasilito. Early Years – Secondary — U.S.-accredited bilingual. Official site: https://criacademy.com/
- [La Paz Community School — Cabo Velas Campus](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=la-paz-community-school-cabo-velas): Brasilito. PreK – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), experiential learning. Official site: https://www.lapazschool.org/en/
- [La Paz Community School — Tempisque Campus](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=la-paz-community-school-tempisque): Palmira. PreK – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), experiential learning. Official site: https://www.lapazschool.org/en/
- [Journey School of Costa Rica — Tamarindo](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=journey-school-tamarindo): Tamarindo. Pre-K – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), project-based learning. Official site: https://journeyschoolofcostarica.com/
- [Del Mar Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=del-mar-academy): Nosara. Pre-K – 12 — Montessori through IB Diploma Programme. Official site: https://www.delmaracademy.com/
- [Educarte](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=educarte): Huacas. Preescolar – Secundaria — Bilingual, MEP-certified. Official site: https://educartecostarica.com/inicio
- [Lakeside International School](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=lakeside-international-school): Sardinal. PreK – 12 — Integrated curriculum, Multiple Intelligences model. Official site: https://www.lakeside.school/
- [Pacífico Internacional](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=pacifico-internacional): Villareal. Preschool – middle school — Waldorf-inspired. Official site: https://waldorf.cr/
- [TIDE Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=tide-academy): Tamarindo. Details not published by the school. Official site: https://www.tideacademy.com/
- [Dolphin's Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school.html?slug=dolphins-academy): Playas del Coco. Elementary — Bilingual. Official site: https://www.dolphinsacademycr.com/

## Guides (accurate, plain-English articles)

- [How Foreigners Buy Property in Costa Rica](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=buying-property-costa-rica-foreigners-guide): Full process — foreigners have the same ownership rights as citizens
- [Costa Rica Closing Costs & Taxes](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-closing-costs-taxes): Transfer tax ~1.5%, annual property tax 0.25%, capital gains 15%
- [Titled vs. Concession Beachfront](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=titled-vs-concession-beachfront-costa-rica): The Maritime Terrestrial Zone (200m rule) explained
- [Guanacaste Towns Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-gold-coast-towns-guide): Tamarindo vs Flamingo vs Conchal vs Potrero vs Nosara
- [Is Guanacaste a Good Investment?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-real-estate-investment-2026): Honest look at appreciation, rental yields, and risks
- [Vacation Rental Income in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-vacation-rental-income-guanacaste): Realistic occupancy, rates, expenses, and the 13% tourism VAT
- [How Americans & Canadians Get Residency in Costa Rica (2026)](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-residency-property-buyers): Pensionado ($1,000/mo pension), Rentista ($2,500/mo or $60k deposit), Inversionista ($150k investment), healthcare, taxes, timeline
- [Tamarindo vs. Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-vs-nosara-real-estate): Which Guanacaste market fits which buyer
- [How Much Does a House in Tamarindo Cost?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-house-prices-2026): 2026 prices — condos from ~$200K, homes from ~$400K, ocean-view estates $2M+
- [Schools across Guanacaste: A Guide for Relocating Families](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=schools-guanacaste-gold-coast-guide): Every international, bilingual and private school near Tamarindo, Flamingo, Nosara and Coco — IB, Montessori, Waldorf and bilingual — plus the drive, the waitlist, and why Costa Rica has no school ratings

## Community guides (living & buying in each town)

- [Playas del Coco](https://soldbytiago.com/playas-del-coco.html): closest town to Liberia airport (~30 min), most affordable condos, sport fishing, Witch's Rock boat trips
- [Potrero](https://soldbytiago.com/potrero.html): calm swimmable bay, value next to Flamingo, Surfside neighborhood, CRIA & La Paz schools 10-15 min
- [Las Catalinas](https://soldbytiago.com/las-catalinas.html): car-free New Urbanist beach town on Playa Danta, walkable village, 1,000 acres of forest trails, flats $400Ks+, villas $1M-$5M+
- [Playa Flamingo](https://soldbytiago.com/flamingo.html): white-sand beach, full-service marina, hillside estates $1M-$4M+, sport fishing
- [Playa Conchal & Brasilito](https://soldbytiago.com/conchal.html): crushed-shell beach, Reserva Conchal resort (golf, Westin), Brasilito value next door, school corridor
- [Playa Grande](https://soldbytiago.com/playa-grande.html): surf town inside Las Baulas National Park, permanently capped supply, 2 min boat to Tamarindo
- [Tamarindo](https://soldbytiago.com/tamarindo.html): most walkable & liquid market, condos from ~$200K, surf schools, Educarte nearby
- [Playa Langosta](https://soldbytiago.com/langosta.html): Tamarindo's quiet oceanfront side, river-mouth surf, premium condos, walk to town
- [Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla](https://soldbytiago.com/avellanas.html): Little Hawaii surf + Hacienda Pinilla gated community (golf, beach club, Journey School, JW Marriott), villas $1M-$5M+
- [Marbella](https://soldbytiago.com/marbella.html): emerging surf coast between Avellanas and Nosara, land at early-mover prices, uncrowded heavy waves
- [Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/nosara.html): Playa Guiones surf, Blue Zone, Del Mar Academy, strict zoning, strongest appreciation ($500K+ entry)
